name: antigravity-autoaccept
description: Auto-accept Run, Accept, and Always Allow buttons in Antigravity via CDP with Webview Guard isolation.

commands.title: Auto Accept V2: Refresh Swarm Mode (bust cache)
Auto Accept V2: Pause/Resume Swarm Mode
Auto Accept V2: Connect Telegram Bot
Auto Accept V2: Disconnect Telegram Bot
Auto Accept V2: Fix Missing Conversations

autoAcceptV2.customButtonTexts.description: Extra button texts to auto-click (for i18n or custom UI). E.g. ['toujours autoriser', 'siempre permitir']

autoAcceptV2.cdpPort.description: The localhost port for Chrome DevTools Protocol. (Default 9333 avoids conflicts with AG Browser Control).

autoAcceptV2.autoAcceptFileEdits.description: Auto-accept file edits (acceptAgentStep). Set to false to review diffs before accepting.

autoAcceptV2.blockedCommands.description: Terminal command patterns to NEVER auto-run (e.g. 'rm -rf', 'git push --force', 'DROP TABLE'). Matched case-insensitively.

autoAcceptV2.allowedCommands.description: If non-empty, ONLY auto-run terminal commands matching these patterns. Blocklist takes priority over allowlist.

autoAcceptV2.autoRetryEnabled.description: Auto-click Retry and Continue buttons when the agent hits errors or invocation limits. Disable to prevent automatic retries.

autoAcceptV2.proLicenseKey.description: AntiGravity AutoAccept Pro license key — enables Swarm Mode (automatic background agent management across all Agent Manager conversations). Get yours at https://yazanbaker.gumroad.com/l/antigravity-pro

autoAcceptV2.swarmIdleSeconds.description: Seconds of user inactivity before Swarm Mode navigates to a pending chat. Higher = less interruption. (Pro feature, requires Swarm Mode license)
